text: Proof-of-Air test. Do EXACTLY this: 1) create file relay/proof/karen-on-air.txt with one line 'Karen executed on the home M4 Air'. 2) git add -A && git -c user.name=Karen -c user.email=warroom@pinla.local commit -m '[Karen] proof: ran on the Air' && git push. 3) bin/warroom-say '[Karen] online ✓ I am running on the home M4 Air via git-relay'. Nothing else.
